source_intake_record.raw_question_text: When a system is taken from state $a$ to state $b$ in \textbf{figure}, 90.0~J of heat flows along path $acb$, and 60.0~J of work is done by the system. How much heat flows into the system along path $adb$ if the work done by the system is 15.0J?
